text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp. It's a time
of intense training where racers can improve their
skills.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We're here! I think we beat the bus that everyone
else is coming in!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, geez, Trainer! Stop making that face—look
sharp!
choice_data_list: I should have taken the bus...
I should have taken the bus...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, geez, Trainer! Stop making that face—look
sharp!
choice_data_list: I should have taken the bus...
I should have taken the bus...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: As if! Whether it's the beach or camping, driving is the only way to go in the summer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, let's go to the beach before
everyone arrives! Teehee, just try and catch me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus begins an exciting summer camp with
Maruzensky.
